'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Mordaph Clafdatha''' was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] who served during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWOSG" />

Captain Clafdatha and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Jord Kraas]] compiled the report [[Technical Specifications: Spacecraft of the Imperium and the Rebel Alliance|V492771R225Y]] which detailed the capabilities and specifications of select [[Starship/Legends|starships]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and other neutral parties, delivered in an incomplete form to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], along with a plea for forgiveness regarding its state.<ref name="XWOSG" />
